narrative:
Munroe Falls 1-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,312 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.8 percentage points.
